name: Endless Path: Twist & Turn
description: endless turns is an exciting and addictive arcade game where quick reactions and precise timing are the key to survival! Navigate an endless twisting path, turn at the right moment, and avoid falling off the track. The challenge gets harder as the speed increases, testing your focus and agility. With simple one-tap controls, vibrant graphics, and smooth gameplay, Endless Turns offers a fun and engaging experience for players of all ages. Stay on the path, set high scores, and challenge yourself to last as long as possible. Can you master the endless twists and turns?
instructions: Tap on screen to follow the path
